info.title: PostZen Public API
info.description: The PostZen Public API lets server-side integrations manage profiles, connected social accounts, OAuth connection flows, media uploads, and post creation.

tags.name: Profiles
tags.description: List, create, update, and delete PostZen profiles.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: List and disconnect connected social accounts.

tags.name: Connect
tags.description: Start and complete OAuth account connection flows.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Create presigned upload URLs for PostZen-hosted media.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create drafts, scheduled posts, or immediate posts.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Manage PostZen API keys programmatically. Creating and deleting keys requires a read-write key with full profile access.

get.description: Returns profiles available to the API key, sorted by creation date (oldest first). Read-only and read-write API keys are accepted.

post.description: Creates a profile. This endpoint requires a read-write API key with access to all profiles.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: PostZen profile id.

get.description: Returns a single profile visible to the API key.

put.description: Updates one or more profile fields. This endpoint requires a read-write API key.

delete.description: Deletes a profile. The default profile cannot be deleted, and profiles with connected accounts must be disconnected first.

get.description: Returns connected social accounts available to the API key, sorted by connection date (newest first). Read-only and read-write API keys are accepted.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter accounts by profile id.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter accounts by platform. `twitter` is accepted as an alias for `x`.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: `connected` returns healthy accounts. `disconnected` returns accounts that need reconnection or are disabled.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number. Must be provided with `limit`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Must be provided with `page`.

delete.description: Disconnects and removes a connected social account. Pending scheduled, queued, and publishing targets for that account are canceled. This endpoint requires a read-write API key.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: PostZen account id.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Social platform to connect. `twitter` is accepted as an alias for `x`.

get.description:
Initiates an OAuth connection flow and returns an authorization URL to redirect the user to. The OAuth state expires after 10 minutes. This endpoint requires a read-write API key.

For `bluesky`, the returned `authUrl` is a PostZen-hosted page where the user enters their Bluesky handle and app password (no developer app or OAuth redirect is required); the connection completes when they submit that form.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: PostZen profile id to attach the connected account to.

parameters.name: redirectUrl
parameters.description: Custom URL PostZen redirects to after the connection completes.

post.description: Exchanges an OAuth authorization code for tokens and connects the account to the specified profile. This endpoint requires a read-write API key.

400.description: Invalid request, expired OAuth state, or a failed platform callback. Callback failures return a camelCase error code with an optional `errorDescription`.

example.errorDescription: OAuth callback did not complete a matching platform connection

403.description: The API key does not have access to the profile, or the OAuth state belongs to a different user or profile.

500.description: The platform token exchange failed or an unexpected server error occurred.

post.summary: Create a presigned media upload URL
post.description: Creates a presigned URL for uploading an image, video, GIF, or PDF to PostZen-hosted storage. Upload the file with an HTTP `PUT` to `uploadUrl`, then reference `publicUrl` in post `mediaItems`. This endpoint requires a read-write API key.

get.description: Returns posts created for the profiles available to the API key, newest first. Read-only and read-write API keys are accepted. Published posts include a `platformPostUrl` for each published platform target. Results are capped to the 1000 most recent matching posts.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter posts by profile id.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter posts to those targeting a specific connected account.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter posts to those with a target on this platform. `twitter` is accepted as an alias for `x`.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter posts by status.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Only include posts scheduled on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp. Posts without a scheduled time are excluded when a date filter is supplied.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Only include posts scheduled on or before this ISO 8601 timestamp. Posts without a scheduled time are excluded when a date filter is supplied.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order. `createdAt` sorts by creation time (newest first). `scheduledFor` sorts by scheduled time (newest first) and excludes posts without a scheduled time.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Defaults to 20.

post.description: Creates a draft, scheduled post, or immediate post. This endpoint requires a read-write API key. Provide exactly one creation mode: `publishNow`, `scheduledFor`, or `isDraft`.

parameters.name: x-request-id
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key. Repeating the same value returns the original post instead of creating a new one.

example.message: Post already exists for this request id

get.description: Returns the API keys for the authenticated account. The full key value is never returned; only a masked `keyPreview` is shown. Read-only and read-write API keys are accepted.

post.description: Creates an API key and returns the full key value exactly once. This endpoint requires a read-write API key with access to all profiles; profile-scoped keys receive a `403`. Store the returned `key` securely — it cannot be retrieved again after this response.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: PostZen API key id.

delete.description: Permanently revokes and deletes an API key. Requires a read-write key with full profile access. A key may delete itself.

404.description: No API key exists with the given id.

PaymentRequired.description: A billing limit prevents the requested connection.

example.error: Add a payment method before connecting more than 2 social accounts.

Forbidden.description: The API key does not have sufficient permission or profile access.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the interval indicated by the `Retry-After` header.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying.

error.description: Human-readable message, or a camelCase error code (for example `oauthCallbackFailed`) when the platform callback fails.

errorDescription.description: Additional detail reported by the platform, when available.

description.description: Pass an empty string or `null` to clear the description.

isDefault.description: Set to `true` to make this the default profile.

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying.

authUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to for platform authorization.

state.description: OAuth state parameter generated by PostZen.

code.description: OAuth authorization code returned by the platform.

profileId.description: PostZen profile id used when the connection was initiated.

filename.description: Original file name. PostZen sanitizes it for storage.

profileId.description: Optional profile scope. If provided, the API key must have access to the profile.

uploadUrl.description: Use this URL for the direct file upload.

CreatePostRequest.description: Provide exactly one creation mode: `publishNow`, `scheduledFor`, or `isDraft`. `platforms` is required unless `isDraft` is true.

title.description: Internal post title. YouTube uses this as the fallback video title when `settings.title` is omitted.

content.description: Shared post text. Platform-specific validation still applies.

mediaItems.description: Duplicate URLs are removed before the post is created.

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 date for scheduled posts. Must be at least 60 seconds in the future.

isDraft.description: Create a draft. `platforms` is optional for drafts.

url.description: PostZen-hosted `publicUrl` from `POST /v1/media/presign`, or an external image/video URL. External URLs are downloaded and re-hosted by PostZen; they must resolve to an image or video (PDF is not supported) of at most 100 MB.

title.description: Optional alt text/title for the media item.

accountId.description: PostZen account id or provider account id.

PostPlatformSettings.description: Platform-specific publishing options. Unknown keys are ignored.

InstagramSettings.description: Instagram target settings. `postType` selects the format: `feed` and `story` take exactly one media item, `reel` takes exactly one video, and `carousel` takes 2–10 media items (images and videos may be mixed). Captions are limited to 2,200 characters.

postType.description: Instagram post format. `feed` (default) and `story` publish a single media item; `reel` publishes a single video; `carousel` publishes 2–10 ordered media items and may mix images and videos. Sending multiple media items with `feed` returns a validation error directing you to `carousel`.

collaborators.description: Up to three Instagram usernames to invite as collaborators. Supported on feed, reel, and carousel posts.

userTags.description: Photo tags with relative `x`/`y` coordinates from 0 to 1. Feed posts only — user tags are not supported on carousels, reels, or stories.

firstComment.description: Posts a first comment after publishing. Supported on feed, reel, and carousel posts. Maximum 2,200 characters.

shareToFeed.description: Reels only. Defaults to `true`. Set to `false` to keep the reel off the profile feed.

videoTitle.description: Optional title for video posts, shown on the LinkedIn video player. Ignored for non-video posts.

boardId.description: Pinterest board to publish the pin to.

altTexts.description: Alt text for each image, matched to the media by order. Each entry is limited to 2000 characters.

languages.description: Up to 3 BCP-47 language codes (e.g. `en`, `pt-BR`) declaring the languages of the post text.

disableLinkCard.description: When true, PostZen skips generating an external link preview card for the first URL in the post.

message.const: Post already exists for this request id

keyPreview.description: Masked preview of the key, for example `pzn_live_a1b2c3d4e...`. The full key is never retrievable after creation.

lastUsedAt.description: Last time the key authenticated a request, or `null` if it has never been used.

scope.description: `full` grants access to all profiles; `profiles` restricts the key to `profileIds`.

profileIds.description: Profiles the key is restricted to. Empty for full-scope keys.

permission.description: `read` keys may only call `GET` endpoints; `read-write` keys may call every endpoint.

key.description: The full API key. Shown only once in the create response — store it securely, as it cannot be retrieved again.

scope.description: `full` grants access to all profiles; `profiles` restricts the key to `profileIds`.

profileIds.description: PostZen profile ids. Required when `scope` is `profiles`, and forbidden when `scope` is `full`.
